name: UNITED PARCEL SERVICE INC
business: UPS, founded in 1907, is a global package delivery and logistics provider. We offer a broad range of industry-leading products and services through our extensive global presence, serving over 200 countries and territories, including transportation and delivery, distribution, contract logistics, ocean freight, airfreight, customs brokerage and insurance.

exposures.sentence: UPS, founded in 1907, is a global package delivery and logistics provider.
Our Digital Access Program ("DAP"), which embeds our shipping solutions directly into leading e-commerce platforms, enabling us to reach SMBs and e-commerce markets more broadly.
Our global healthcare portfolio generated more than $11 billion in revenue, furthering our progress towards our goal to become the number one complex healthcare logistics provider in the world.
We continue to invest in facility automation to enhance operational efficiency.

We leverage advanced and emerging technologies, including artificial intelligence ("AI"), and offer a variety of digital tools and capabilities that enable customers to integrate UPS functionality into their distribution channels.
A significant cybersecurity incident, increased data protection regulations, or other information technology related risks, could materially adversely affect us.
We also offer integrated supply chain and high-value shipment insurance solutions through UPS Capital.

We continually seek to improve the productivity and efficiency of our global integrated network by using technology to move from a scanning to a sensing network, including using RFID technology in our Smart Package Smart Facilities initiative.
We participate in the Civil Reserve Air Fleet ("CRAF") program, which allows the U.S. Department of Defense to requisition specified UPS aircraft for military use during a national defense emergency.

catalysts.event: Agreement with USPS to support final-mile delivery for Ground Saver and Mail Innovations volumes starting in 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we entered into an agreement with the United States Postal Service ("USPS") to support final-mile delivery for a portion of our Ground Saver and Mail Innovations volumes starting in 2026.

catalysts.event: New air hub in the Philippines opening towards the end of 2026.
catalysts.sentence: Our new air hub in the Philippines is slated to open towards the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Expansion in Hong Kong planned to open in 2028.
catalysts.sentence: Our expansion in Hong Kong is planned to open in 2028.

catalysts.event: National master agreement with Teamsters expires.
catalysts.sentence: Our national master agreement with the Teamsters expires on July 31, 2028.

catalysts.event: Reduce volume from largest customer by more than 50% by June 2026 from 2024 levels.
catalysts.sentence: As previously disclosed, our strategy involves reducing volumes from this customer by more than 50% by June 2026 from 2024 levels.

catalysts.event: Expected savings of approximately $3 billion in 2026 from Network Reconfiguration and Efficiency Reimagined initiatives.
catalysts.sentence: We expect savings of approximately $3 billion in 2026.

catalysts.event: Transformation strategy initiatives expected to conclude by 2027.
catalysts.sentence: These initiatives are expected to conclude by 2027.
